label: Garrison Heat
description: As the cell operates, the Gray Garrison begins to notice patterns. At 8, a sector-wide lockdown and BoQC audit occurs.

label: The Syndicate's Patience
description: Hask knows the cell exists. At 6, he sells them to the BoQC or extorts them for all their gear.

label: Oxygen Scrubber Failure
description: Sector 43's old scrubbers are failing. At 4, the sector becomes uninhabitable, forcing the cell to find a new safehouse.
